description: Account Detail No-Op Action Buttons. Wire 6 non-functional buttons: (1) Create Deal button no onClick (F-05, AccountDetail.tsx:229). (2) Add Contact button no onClick in overview (F-06, AccountDetail.tsx:233). (3-4) Add Contact buttons no onClick in contacts tab header and empty state (F-07/F-08, AccountContactsList.tsx:61,85). (5-6) Create Opportunity buttons no onClick in opportunities tab header and empty state (F-10/F-11, AccountOpportunitiesList.tsx:68,116). Each button should open the appropriate create form or association dialog with accountId pre-filled. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 3-5.
